note: No video bundler configured. Set EXTERNAL_VIDEO_WEBHOOK for production or BUNDLE_PROVIDER=ffmpeg (plus `npm i ffmpeg-static fluent-ffmpeg`) for local dev.
title: Trojan Horse: The Greatest Lie Ever Told
hook: One giant horse. Ten years of war. Ended in a single night.
script: According to legend, on June 11, 1184 BC, the Greeks finally ended the Trojan War. After ten long years of siege, they wheeled in a giant wooden horse as a 'gift.' The Trojans pulled it inside their walls. That night, soldiers crawled out and opened the gates. The city burned. Three thousand years later, we still don't know if it really happened — or if it was the greatest military con of all time.
